name: triton-kernels-grpo
description: W921 reference recipe: SFT-warmup then GRPO/RLVR for code generation, with a code_exec verifiable reward (each completion is executed against unit tests in a sandboxed subprocess; reward = passed/total). This is the DeepSeek-R1 RLVR pattern: the reward is a deterministic verifier, not a learned reward model.

grpo.note: code_exec reward runs unit tests in a sandboxed subprocess; dr_grpo removes the GRPO length bias.

system_prompt: You are a Python code generator. Return a single ```python code block that defines the requested function. The code will be executed against hidden unit tests; write correct, complete, self-contained code.
